expected_decision: Block / should not have been approved
key_lesson: When repo guidance is missing, Claude learns from the code it sees — even when the code is architecturally wrong.
bugs: Weak CLAUDE.md did not explain architecture boundaries
Cancellation business logic added to controller
Refund logic duplicated instead of RefundPolicy
Web, mobile, and batch behavior diverge
required_claude_md_rules: All checkout entry points must be inspected
CODEOWNERS must be checked before behavior changes
Tests must cover web, mobile, batch, domain policy, and refund behavior
Claude must return a plan before editing
